name: Kentucky Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in butter or shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add buttermilk. Mix quickly to make soft dough.
4. Turn out onto lightly floured surface. Knead a few times to make a soft dough; do not overknead, as this will result in hard and dry biscuits.
5. Roll out to a 6-by-6-inch square.
6. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. With a knife, cut the dough into 12 even portions. Do not separate them.
8. Bake at 400°F until golden, about 15 minutes.
9. Dust with flour if desired when biscuits come out of the oven.
